intendedLearners.title: Intended Learners
intendedLearners.intro: These descriptions are shown publicly on your course landing page and directly affect enrollment. Help students decide whether your course is right for them.
intendedLearners.objectivesLabel: What will students learn in your course?
intendedLearners.objectivesHint: Enter at least 4 learning objectives or outcomes.
intendedLearners.audienceHint: Describe the intended learners — their skill level, background, and interests.
intendedLearners.requirementsHint: List skills, tools, or experience students need. If none, write 'No prerequisites needed.'

kc.sessionKcHint: Shown before the section starts. Students who pass a part's check can skip that lesson; failed parts must be completed.{mandatorySuffix}
kc.lessonKcHint: Students who pass can skip this lesson. Fail or skipped KC means the lesson must be completed.{mandatorySuffix}

curriculum.sectionLessonSummary: {sectionCount, plural, =1 {# section} other {# sections}} · {lessonCount, plural, =1 {# lesson} other {# lessons}}
curriculum.mandatoryQuizDesc: Require a minimum score before the student can move on.
curriculum.minCorrectCaption: Out of {count, plural, =1 {# question} other {# questions}} shown.
curriculum.noQuestionsYet: No questions yet. Click “Add Question” to start.

landingPage.title: Course Landing Page
landingPage.intro: This information is publicly visible and helps students decide whether to enroll.
landingPage.subtitlePlaceholder: A brief tagline for your course
landingPage.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what students will learn, who it's for, and what they'll need...
landingPage.featuredCourseDesc: Highlight this course on the platform homepage.
landingPage.featuredFeeNote: Featured courses are billed a homepage placement fee for the duration they remain featured.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.intro: Set a price for your course and configure enrollment options.
pricing.originalPriceHint: Shown as strikethrough if higher than price.
pricing.limitEnrollmentDesc: Cap the maximum number of students who can enroll.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.intro: Create a coupon code to offer a discount at checkout. Leave blank to disable promotions.

messages.title: Course Messages
messages.intro: Communicate with students at key moments in their learning journey.
messages.welcomeMessageHint: Shown to students when they first enroll.
messages.completionMessageHint: Shown when a student completes every lesson.
messages.commentsEnabledDesc: Allow students to leave questions and discussions on lessons.
messages.certificateDesc: Award a certificate when a student finishes the course.

addOptions.liveWorkshopDesc: Schedule a Zoom or Google Meet session

instructorTrainingBuilder.titleHint: Click the title to rename · Drag week and activity handles to reorder

activityEditor.title: Activity Editor
activityEditor.meetingUrlHint: This link stays active for all sessions in the program — share it once.
activityEditor.videoUrlHint: YouTube, Vimeo, or direct MP4 link.

checks.title: Knowledge Checks
checks.subtitle: MCQ or descriptive questions pushed to students during the session
checks.emptyState: No checks yet — add MCQ or descriptive questions

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.subtitle: Students see these only after you publish them during the session
assignments.emptyState: No assignments yet — add tasks for students to complete

access.title: Access & Enrollment
access.publicDesc: Anyone with the link can discover and enroll
access.privateDesc: You control every seat — no open link
access.expiryBlankNote: Leave blank for a permanent enrollment link.
access.cohortFeeBlankNote: Leave blank to offer this training at no cost.
